case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TEKESHA HOLMES ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $8.76 / DECLARATION OF SUZAN KARAYEL IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED SEP-29-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 144 BROOKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134; COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, TEKESHA
